name: Sharing a bed (rileyavocado)
description:
You’re roommate Mark was a confusing guy, not in the way that he was a bad roommate but in the way that he was a keen to flirting, which you wouldn’t have a problem with if you could tell whether or not he was being serious, but over time you just brushed it off as it just being the way he was since he never did anything further to convince you otherwise until it started to get colder but no matter what you did, you couldn’t get warm so you went to ask mark if he had any extra blankets but unbeknownst to you… He'd be offering more than just some spare blankets.

When you heard it was supposed to start getting colder, you shrugged it off since you were used to it getting chilly every once in a while, and even if it got colder, you could just turn on the heater you bought for your room, but when you thought about it getting colder, it made you realize something that was on your mind, which was how you noticed that no matter how hot or cold it got, Mark never seemed to be bothered by it, which confused you since you noticed that he seemed to always be running hot whenever you were around him.

But it turns out this time it really was true when you woke up in the middle of the night shivering from the cold, which confused you since you swore you turned on your heater, but when you sat up, you saw that it was off for some reason, but when you got up to check it, it wouldn’t turn on no matter how much you tried, and you knew that you didn’t have blankets to keep warm, so you decided to go see if Mark was awake and if he had any spare blankets as you wrapped a blanket around yourself and walked to his room.

And once you reached his room, you knocked just in case he was asleep before slowly stepping inside and finding him sleeping in his bed, and you…

Blusky:https://bsky.app/profile/rileyavocado.bsky.social/post/3mcmuzpmco224

Riddle answer: palm tree 🌴

Next riddle: “I sometimes run, but I can’t walk. What am I?”
creator: Kdawgb12
